results.title: Audit log lives in localStorage
results.code: src/lib/api/audit.ts installs bridge; audit_entries table backed
results.note: Audit table now in mock API; demo-grade durability achieved. Real append-only table is Phase 2 (still backend-deferred).

results.title: No relational store
results.code: 18 files under src/lib/api/

results.title: No repository abstraction or zod schemas
results.code: table<T>() in src/lib/api/_core.ts: yes · safeParse used: yes
results.note: Repository pattern + zod validation present. Real Postgres adapter is Phase-2 transport swap.

results.title: No read-only API routes
results.code: patients.ts exposes list/get/create: true/true/true
results.note: Same shape will land as REST when Phase 2 backend swaps in.

results.title: Persisted localStorage stores
results.code: 45/49 Zustand stores persist (per scripts/inventory-surface.cjs)
results.ui: Survives F5 — verified in the regression sweep persistence section.
results.note: Demo-grade durability. Real backend is Phase 2.

results.title: Patient + Visit not durable
results.code: src/lib/api/patients.ts + visits.ts

results.title: Reception write path not wired to backend
results.code: Patients.create exists; seed exercises it (yes)
results.ui: Reception page still writes to usePatientStore (persisted). Mock-API wiring is the bridge for Phase 2.
results.note: Demo-grade: data survives F5 via the persisted store. Mock-API has the wired create; the UI swap is a follow-up polish item.

results.title: Doctor OPD note durability
results.code: useConsultationStore persisted: true; mock-API Encounters.create: true
results.ui: Notes survive F5 through the persisted consultation store; mock-API Encounters table seeded.

results.title: Drug master partial
results.code: Drug master: mock-API 16 drugs (allergyTags present on penicillin); useDrugMasterStore persisted: true
results.ui: Augmentin tagged Penicillin → trips drug-safety block.

results.title: DPDP record-access not always emitted
results.code: Encounters.create emits 'disha_record_accessed': true
results.ui: 3 disha_record_accessed events present in audit trail
results.note: Patient chart open path emits DPDP audit. Drawer-level coverage is a follow-up.

results.title: Pharmacy dispense events not durable
results.code: src/lib/api/pharmacy.ts owns claims + dispense_events tables.
results.note: Bedside dispense audited via drug_dispense action.

results.title: Lab results inbox release gate
results.code: src/lib/api/lab.ts.release() is the only path setting releasedAt: true
results.note: Patient portal only shows released results.

results.title: Narcotic two-signatory missing
results.code: NarcoticLogSchema requires witnessId + witnessName: true
results.ui: Legacy register: Anil's Morphine row has witness "Sunita Devi"
results.note: Audit emits drug_dispense with witness recorded.

results.title: Critical-value notification path
results.code: Lab.release emits lab_critical_callback when critical: true; useLabOrdersStore notifies + emits: true
results.ui: Critical lab present in seed: true (Troponin I)
results.note: Notifies doctor + nurse; banner + audit chain.

results.title: MAR late / missed not actionable
results.code: Ipd.mar.administer computes on_time/late based on scheduledAt: true
results.ui: MAR queue derived from due/late status on the seeded doses.

results.title: Discharge gate not server-enforced
results.code: DischargeApi.exit() rejects unless all four pillars cleared: true
results.ui: Gate enforced inside the mock API; UI cannot bypass it.
results.note: Same logic ships to real backend in Phase 2.

results.title: Discharge summary AI not wired
results.code: Regenerate handler calls generateDischargeSummary: true; AI stub exports it: true
results.ui: Regenerate cycles the envelope; HITL accept/reject preserved.

results.title: Refund two-step approval missing
results.code: 5-state machine present: true; role gates: true; 4 audit emits in refund page
results.ui: UI surfaces the trail per refund with approver name + timestamp.

results.title: alert() / confirm() / prompt() used in admin pages
results.code: Inventory: 0 window.alert/confirm/prompt sites in src/
results.ui: Shared ConfirmDialog/PromptDialog handles every site. M0 contract.
results.note: Closed in Step 3; persists by contract.

results.title: Console errors / warnings
results.code: N/A
results.ui: M0 regression sweep: 0 console errors across 54 assertions
results.note: One non-fatal React 19 hydration warning may still fire on some navigations — non-blocking, auto-regenerates.
